title: Mocking and Spying in Jest Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Jest mocks and spies.

questions.question: Regarding Jest testing, what is 'Mocking' used for?
options: To replace a real component with a fake one to isolate a unit test

questions.question: Which Jest function is used to create a new mock function?
What is a key difference between mocking and spying in Jest?
options: Mocking replaces a real component; Spying records its behavior without changing it
Mocking is for objects; Spying is for functions
Its only possible for SQL repositories

questions.question: Which function in Jest is used to 'spy' on an existing method of an object?
